name: game-project
description: A full-stack TypeScript game project with modern tech stack

scripts.dev: concurrently "bun run --cwd packages/shared dev" "bun run --cwd packages/server dev" "bun run --cwd packages/web dev"
scripts.build: bun run build:shared && bun run build:server && bun run build:web
scripts.lint: bun --cwd packages/shared lint && bun --cwd packages/server lint && bun --cwd packages/web lint
scripts.lint:fix: bun --cwd packages/shared lint:fix && bun --cwd packages/server lint:fix && bun --cwd packages/web lint:fix
scripts.test: bun --cwd packages/shared test && bun --cwd packages/server test && bun --cwd packages/web test
scripts.test:watch: bun --cwd packages/shared test:watch & bun --cwd packages/server test:watch & bun --cwd packages/web test:watch
